MELItem.Title: Engine Fuel Shutoff Valve Indication Systems (GE)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative provided the associated engine fuel shutoff valve is verified to operate normally once each flight day.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify that the associated engine fuel shutoff valve is operating normally once each flight day (AMM DDG 73-21-05).

ListItem.Para: Start the associated engine and allow engine to stabilize at ground idle.
Open the associated engine fuel spar valve circuit breaker and lock with DO NOT CLOSE tag.
For the left engine, circuit breaker SPAR VLV/EEC RESET CHB CTRL-L ENGINE.
For the right engine, circuit breaker SPAR VLV/EEC RESET CHB CTRL-R ENGINE.
After minimum engine operating time, position the associated engine FUEL CONTROL switch to CUTOFF.
For engine shutdown within 10 seconds, the fuel shutoff valve is operating normally.
Confirm the associated FUEL SPAR VALVE L or R status message is displayed.
After engine has stopped rotating, close the associated engine fuel spar valve circuit breaker.
Erase the latched FUEL SPAR VALVE L or R status message.
For engine not shutdown before 10 seconds, the fuel shutoff valve is not operating normally.
Monitor EGT and be prepared to motor the engine.
Close the associated engine fuel spar valve circuit breaker.
The engine may continue to operate for one minute.

OperationNote.Para: The ENG FUEL VALVE L or R advisory message will be displayed.
